name: coingecko
description: Get current cryptocurrency prices. Returns real-time prices for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and thousands of other cryptocurrencies in any fiat currency. Use for questions like 'what is Bitcoin worth', 'Ethereum price in USD', 'crypto prices today'.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. Required: 'ids' (comma-separated coin IDs like 'bitcoin,ethereum,solana,dogecoin'), 'vs_currencies' (comma-separated fiat codes like 'usd,eur,gbp'). Optional: 'include_24hr_change' (boolean), 'include_market_cap' (boolean).

output.description: JSON object mapping coin IDs to objects with price in each requested currency (e.g. {"bitcoin": {"usd": 66911}}).
